---
id: send-notification
title: "Notifications"
description: "Send a notification using a pre-configured mail template. Requires `template_id` and `channel` (email, sms, or whatsapp)."

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/send-notification/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Send a notification using a pre-configured mail template. Requires `template_id` and `channel` (email, sms, or whatsapp).

  as={"h2"}
